name: gotify-mcp
description: Gotify push notification server management via MCP tools. Send notifications, manage applications and clients.

settings.name: Gotify URL
settings.description: URL of your Gotify server (e.g., https://gotify.example.com)

settings.name: Gotify Client Token
settings.description: Client token for reading messages and managing resources

settings.name: Gotify App Token
settings.description: Application token for sending push notifications
